title: Hummus Smoke Broil
description: A quick-fix Italian dish featuring hummus for a creamy base with smoked meats or vegetables, perfect for Whole30 diets.

ingredients.name: 1/2 block smoked gouda or similar cheese (optional)

instructions: Blend chickpeas, garlic, lemon juice, tahini, olive oil, and salt until smooth. Season to taste.
Divide hummus into two bowls for serving if desired. Optionally add sliced tomatoes or cheese cubes on top before broiling.
Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Place tomato slices or gouda on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil hummus mixture in a shallow dish directly under the heat source for about 5-7 minutes until warmed and slightly bubbly. Stir occasionally, avoiding overbrowning.
Once done, top each serving of hummus with tomato slices or cheese, if using.
